name: Lemon Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. Refrigerate the evaporated milk for 24 hours before starting.
2. Melt the butter in the bottom of a 13 x 9-inch flat cake pan. Press graham cracker crumbs evenly over the butter.
3. Dissolve the lemon gelatin powder in boiling water, then add sugar and juice of one lemon. Stir until smooth.
4. Once the gelatin mixture is congealed, beat it until fluffy.
5. Beat the evaporated milk until thick.
6. Fold the two mixtures together and pour over the graham cracker crumbs.
7. Sprinkle additional crumbs on top. Refrigerate overnight.
8. Cut into squares to serve.
Serves: 12
